! Title: ShieldNova - Services / Twitter
! Description: Domain set for Twitter traffic routing.
! Author: Harry (https://github.com/harryheros)
! Homepage: https://github.com/harryheros/shieldnova
! License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
! Profile: Conservative / Compatibility-First
! Built: 2026-04-28 00:14:00 UTC
! Total: 6
! Breakdown: service_rules=6

! X (Twitter)
! Purpose: service-specific routing for proxy tools.
! This is NOT a blocking list.

||twitter.com^                            ! Twitter - main platform (legacy)
||x.com^                                  ! X - main platform
||t.co^                                   ! Twitter/X - short links
||twimg.com^                              ! Twitter/X - image CDN
||tweetdeck.com^                          ! TweetDeck
||periscope.tv^                           ! Periscope (Twitter)
